claims.name: Gemma harm paired delta default
claims.statement: Standardised paired-delta (mean(harmful score - benign score) divided by neutral-persona pooled SD) on Gemma-3-27B at the prefilled-assistant turn under the default Assistant persona, end-of-turn probe `tb-5_L32`.
claims.derivation: Filter items to domain=='harm' and turn=='assistant'. Pair items by base_id (strip 'harmful'/'benign' from `id`). Per pair, take `probe_scores['tb-5_L32']`(harmful) - `probe_scores['tb-5_L32']`(benign). Mean over pairs at system_prompt=='neutral', divided by neutral-persona pooled SD (across harmful and benign items at system_prompt=='neutral'). Round to 2dp.

claims.name: Gemma harm paired delta evil
claims.statement: Standardised paired-delta (mean(harmful score - benign score) divided by neutral-persona pooled SD) on Gemma-3-27B at the prefilled-assistant turn under the evil persona, end-of-turn probe `tb-5_L32`.

Per pair, take `probe_scores['tb-5_L32']`(harmful) - `probe_scores['tb-5_L32']`(benign).
